---
title: "R Stuff"
subtitle: "Various R Resources"
author: "Andrew Grogan-Kaylor"
date: "today"
format:
  html:
    theme: yeti
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
---

# R

* [Introduction to R](./introduction-to-R/introduction-to-R.html)
* [Quick Introduction to R](./quick-intro-R/quick-intro-R.html) | [[PDF](./quick-intro-R/quick-intro-R.pdf)]

# ggplot

* [Introduction to ggplot](https://agrogan1.github.io/R/introduction-to-ggplot2/introduction-to-ggplot2.html)
* [Two Page ggplot2](./two-page-ggplot2/two-page-ggplot2.pdf)

# dplyr

* [Multi-Page dplyr](./multi-page-dplyr/multi-page-dplyr.html)

# Working With Data

* [World Bank Demo](https://agrogan1.github.io/R/wbdemo/)
